shots.description: 月下对峙——执法者宣判死刑。林夜与执法者在月光荒坛对视，三道霜白剑影亮起。
shots.dialogue:
00.00s-02.00s: ambient sound, no dialogue
02.00s-04.00s: 【char_002】: 凡人逆命，必死。

segments.action: Static Hold — 两人月下对峙，尘雾缓慢飘散
Push In — 执法者抬手，剑影亮起 [char_002]
Rack Focus — 三道霜白剑影蜂鸣点亮 [char_002]
Return Snap — 林夜握紧裂剑，蓝光裂缝渗出 [char_001]
Static Floating — 两人对峙，尘雾中月光如刃 [char_001]
Dutch Angle Close Up — 林夜眼神坚毅特写 [char_001]
Static Hold — 对峙定格，风吹衣袂 [char_001]

shots.prompt:
GOAL: Establish the death-sentence standoff between mortal warrior and divine enforcer at the moonlit ruined altar.
SHOT_PLAN:
  00.00s-01.00s: Static Hold (No Movement) — two warriors face off at moonlit altar, dust drifts slowly [char_001]
  01.00s-03.00s: Push In (Killer Intent) — Enforcer raises one hand, three frost-white sword shadows ignite with piercing hum, fog swirls [char_002]
  03.00s-05.00s: Rack Focus (Fast) — sword shadows pulse with cold light, dust particles caught in moonbeam [char_002]
  05.00s-07.00s: Return Snap (Reaction) — Lin Ye tightens grip on cracked sword, faint blue soul-fire seeps through blade cracks [char_001]
  07.00s-09.00s: Static Floating — standoff holds, moonlight cuts through dust like blade between them [char_001]
  09.00s-11.00s: Dutch Angle Close Up (Tension) — Lin Ye's cold determined eyes, wind catches hair [char_001]
  11.00s-12.00s: Static Hold (No Movement) — standoff frozen, robes billow in wind [char_001]
DIALOGUE:
  00.00s-02.00s: ambient sound, no dialogue
  02.00s-04.00s: 【char_002】: 凡人逆命，必死。
EXPORT: Cold moonlight chiaroscuro, dust particles, frost-white sword glow, faint blue crack-light on blade, desolate altar stone, volumetric fog
VISUAL_PROMPT: Two warriors face off at moonlit ruined altar, three spectral swords ignite, cracked blade glows blue, dust swirls in cold light

shots.description: 第一剑——林夜硬接被震退。剑影白蛇出洞，林夜举剑格挡，火花四溅，被震退三步。
shots.dialogue:
00.00s-02.00s: ambient sound, no dialogue
02.00s-04.00s: 【char_002】: 这就是你的全部？

segments.action: Static Hold — 剑影蓄势，雾气翻涌
Crash Zoom In — 第一道剑影如白蛇刺出 [char_002]
Snap Zoom — 林夜举剑格挡，银白火花爆开 [char_001]
Reverse Pullback — 林夜被震退三步，靴底划出沟痕 [char_001]
Profile Tracking — 林夜稳住身形，碎石飞溅 [char_001]
Static Floating — 执法者纹丝不动，蔑视目光 [char_002]
Static Hold — 尘埃落定在林夜脚边 [char_001]

shots.prompt:
GOAL: Show the overwhelming power gap as the first sword shadow knocks Lin Ye back three steps.
SHOT_PLAN:
  00.00s-01.00s: Static Hold (No Movement) — sword shadow coils, fog churns around altar [char_002]
  01.00s-03.00s: Crash Zoom In (Head on) — first frost-white sword shadow launches like white serpent at chest [char_002]
  03.00s-05.00s: Snap Zoom (Face) — Lin Ye raises cracked sword to block, silver-white sparks explode on collision [char_001]
  05.00s-07.00s: Reverse Pullback (Vacuum) — impact sends Lin Ye sliding back three steps, boots gouge stone [char_001]
  07.00s-09.00s: Profile Tracking (Handheld Shake) — Lin Ye steadies stance, stone debris scatters [char_001]
  09.00s-11.00s: Static Floating — Enforcer stands utterly still, contemptuous gaze, dust settles [char_002]
  11.00s-12.00s: Static Hold (No Movement) — dust settles around Lin Ye's displaced feet [char_001]
DIALOGUE:
  00.00s-02.00s: ambient sound, no dialogue
  02.00s-04.00s: 【char_002】: 这就是你的全部？
EXPORT: Silver-white spark explosion, boot furrows in stone, frost-white sword glow, moonlit dust, chiaroscuro contrast
VISUAL_PROMPT: Frost-white sword shadow strikes warrior, massive spark explosion, warrior slides back three steps on stone altar

shots.description: 第二剑——近身缠斗、借力反击。林夜架偏剑影旋身反斩，两人近身缠斗兵器交锁。
shots.dialogue:
00.00s-02.00s: ambient sound, no dialogue
02.00s-04.00s: 【char_001】: 还没完——

segments.action: Static Hold — 第二道剑影侧面逼近
Over-Shoulder Whip — 林夜架偏剑影借力旋身 [char_001]
Profile Tracking — 反斩切向执法者，首次皱眉 [char_001]
Snap Zoom — 近身三连斩交锋 [char_001]
Low Angle Truck Left — 执法者指弹化解每一击 [char_002]
Dutch Angle Close Up — 兵器交锁面对面僵持 [char_001]
Static Hold — 两人咬牙对视定格 [char_001]

  11.00s-12.00s: Static Hold (No Movement) — locked weapons, both fighters strain, breath visible in cold air [char_001]
DIALOGUE:

shots.description: 第三剑——绞杀漩涡围困。三道剑影合并为绞杀漩涡，林夜被卷入被迫单膝跪地。
shots.dialogue:
00.00s-02.00s: ambient sound, no dialogue
02.00s-04.00s: 【char_002】: 跪下受死。

segments.action: Static Hold — 三道剑影汇聚蓄力
Orbital Spin — 剑影合并为旋转漩涡 [char_002]
Crash Zoom In — 漩涡吞噬林夜，衣衫撕裂 [char_001]
Tumble Cam — 漩涡内血雾飞溅 [char_001]
Low Angle Truck Left — 林夜被迫单膝跪地插剑 [char_001]
Silhouette Reveal — 执法者俯视跪地的林夜 [char_002]
Static Hold — 漩涡旋转，林夜咬牙支撑 [char_001]

shots.prompt:
GOAL: The sword vortex trap engulfs Lin Ye and forces him to one knee — his lowest point before the turning point.
SHOT_PLAN:

  03.00s-05.00s: Crash Zoom In (Head on) — vortex engulfs Lin Ye, robes shredding, sparks of light [char_001]
  05.00s-07.00s: Tumble Cam (Chaos) — inside vortex, blood sprays from shoulders and arms, fabric tears [char_001]
  07.00s-09.00s: Low Angle Truck Left (Slider) — Lin Ye forced to one knee, drives sword into stone to brace [char_001]
  09.00s-11.00s: Silhouette Reveal (Backlight) — Enforcer towers outside vortex, looking down with authority [char_002]
  11.00s-12.00s: Static Hold (No Movement) — vortex spins, Lin Ye grits teeth bracing, dust whirls [char_001]
DIALOGUE:
  00.00s-02.00s: ambient sound, no dialogue
  02.00s-04.00s: 【char_002】: 跪下受死。

VISUAL_PROMPT: Massive sword vortex engulfs warrior forcing him to one knee, enforcer towers above in moonlight

Static Hold — three sword shadows merge into rotating vortex above altar. Lin Ye kneels on one knee, bleeding, cracked sword planted in ground. Enforcer towers above, arms crossed. Vortex spins in background but characters remain clearly visible in foreground. Moonlit chiaroscuro, dust and debris caught in vortex wind. Camera holds medium-wide framing keeping both figures sharp.

shots.description: 血祭阵法——玉简觉醒。鲜血滴在阵纹上，林夜取出玉简撕开绷带，蓝光蔓延祭坛。
shots.dialogue:
00.00s-02.00s: ambient sound, no dialogue
02.00s-04.00s: 【char_001】: 我拿命当筹码——

segments.action: Static Hold — 林夜低头，鲜血缓缓滴落
Push In — 鲜血滴落阵纹，光芒初现 [char_001]
Snap Zoom — 取出玉简，青蓝脉动光 [char_001]
Dutch Angle Close Up — 撕开腕部绷带，鲜血涌出 [char_001]
Wide Shot + Fog Drift — 阵纹如血管点亮蔓延 [char_001]
Reverse Pullback — 蓝光蔓延逼近执法者脚下 [char_002]
Static Hold — 祭坛蓝光脉动，林夜决意 [char_001]

  09.00s-11.00s: Reverse Pullback (Vacuum) — blue light races through cracks toward Enforcer's feet, dust lifts [char_002]
  11.00s-12.00s: Static Hold (No Movement) — altar pulses with blue light, Lin Ye's resolved expression [char_001]
DIALOGUE:
  00.00s-02.00s: ambient sound, no dialogue
  02.00s-04.00s: 【char_001】: 我拿命当筹码——

  03.00s-05.00s: Profile Tracking (Handheld Shake) — Enforcer's face changes, thrusts both hands creating solid sword wall [char_002]
  05.00s-07.00s: Tumble Cam (Chaos) — Lin Ye slams into white blade wall, blue fire and white light explode [char_001]
  07.00s-09.00s: Push In (Killer Intent) — silhouette pushes through blinding explosion, smoke trails [char_001]
  09.00s-11.00s: Low Angle Truck Left (Slider) — breaks through crumbling sword wall step by step, debris rains [char_001]
  11.00s-12.00s: Static Hold (No Movement) — emerges from wall, freeze frame of breakthrough moment [char_001]
DIALOGUE:
  00.00s-02.00s: ambient sound, no dialogue
EXPORT: Blue-white energy explosion, blood scatter trails, crumbling white blade wall, silhouette in explosion light
VISUAL_PROMPT: Warrior charges through wall of white sword blades, blue-white explosion on impact, pushes through step by step

Lin Ye charges forward like an arrow through a wall of white sword blades, blood scattering from wounds. His dark robes torn, cracked sword glowing blue, he pushes step by step through the barrier of spinning blades. Sparks and blade fragments fly around him. Camera tracks his profile as he advances. Clear figure silhouette maintained against bright sword energy.

shots.description: 一击刺入——眉心印记碎裂。穿墙后面对面，黑蓝尖刺刺入眉心印记。
shots.dialogue:
00.00s-02.00s: ambient sound, no dialogue
02.00s-06.00s: 【char_001】: 这一击，不是为了赢。是为了让你记住——凡人，也能逆天。

segments.action: Static Hold — 穿墙烟尘未散
Snap Zoom — 穿墙而出面对面 [char_001]
Dutch Angle Close Up — 四目相对极近距离 [char_001]
Push In — 黑蓝尖刺精准刺入眉心印记 [char_001]
Rack Focus — 裂痕从印记中心辐射扩散 [char_002]
Reverse Pullback — 执法者瞳孔放大不可置信 [char_002]
Static Hold — 慢镜定格高潮瞬间 [char_001]

shots.description: 执法者跪地——规则崩塌。剑影碎裂如雪，眉心印记碎为金尘，执法者跪地，大雨倾盆。

segments.action: Static Hold — 印记碎裂余波
Wide Shot + Fog Drift — 剑影碎裂如雪花飘散 [char_002]
Snap Zoom — 眉心印记碎为金尘 [char_002]
Reverse Pullback — 执法者缓缓跪倒 [char_002]
Push In — 金尘飘散如萤火 [char_002]
Wide Shot + Fog Drift — 大雨倾盆而下 [char_001]
Static Hold — 雨中跪地定格 [char_002]

shots.description: 雨幕中转身——消失于黑暗。林夜拔剑转身走入雨中，执法者跪地目送。
